items.title: US Judge dismisses subpoenas against Fed Chair Powell in DOJ probe – WSJ
items.summary: An article of the Wall Street Journal mentioned that a Federal Judge threw out a pair of subpoenas that the Justice Department issued to the Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell.
